If a banyan, Butea Frondosa and Glomerous fig tree, or a ban-
yan and a holy fig tree are found together, there will be water under-
neath them at a depth of three-cubits; and the vein will be flowing
towards the north. [Another meaning ;—there will be water under-
neath at a distance of 3 cubits from ihcm and at a depth of 15
cubits (17}?)]
[In the interpretation of this verse too the same doubt persists:
The word also mean at a depth of 15 cubits. Even Sage
Snrasoata's words do not help resolve the doubt, for he says :
ftrrt ii
The last line may also be construed as ; There will be water
underneath them at a distance of 3 cubits to the north of the trees :
and the vein will be a source of abundant water.]
